title: An automation that when all items and subitems in a group are complete, to notify somebody
excerpt: It would be very nice to have an automation (or the ability to make one) wherein if a group becomes empty, or every item in a group’s status becomes something, to then email somebody something. For example, if all Tasks …

posts.author: MarkM (Mark McHugh)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very nice to have an automation (or the ability to make one) wherein if a group becomes empty, or every item in a group’s status becomes something, to then email somebody something. For example, if all Tasks in a “To Do” group have been changed to “Done”, and then moved to a different group, leaving “To Do” empty, that somebody would automatically receive an email saying “John, Your team has completed all items in the “To Do” list.”

Maybe a way to require all items in multiple groups to be “Done”, or otherwise moved/removed before sending said email.

I see plenty of ways for when an item, or sub item status is changed to notify, but I would like for one email when an entire group (or multiple groups) are empty of tasks.
